text.title: Trunk-Based Feature Flags Output Contract
text.summary: JSON Schema for the per-flag spec artefact. A PR introducing a flag without a schema-valid spec cannot pass the bot's merge gate.

example.code: { "artefact_id": "ff-f066-shadow-router", "flag_id": "quote_shadow_go_pct", "owner_email": "ruslan@faion.net", "type": "release", "ramp_plan": [ {"pct": 1, "gate": "diff_rate < 0.5"}, {"pct": 10, "gate": "diff_rate < 0.5 AND error_rate at baseline"}, {"pct": 50, "gate": "all clusters classified"}, {"pct": 100, "gate": "sign-off received"} ], "kill_switch_tested": true, "cleanup_ticket_id": "TICKET-4421", "cleanup_sla_date": "2026-07-23", "dark_launch": true, "version": "1.0.0", "last_reviewed": "2026-05-23" }

example.note: artefact_id missing ff- prefix; flag_id violates pattern; owner_email malformed and is a team alias (violates r2); type=misc not in enum; ramp_plan empty (violates r3); kill_switch_tested=false but ramp_plan non-empty (violates r4); cleanup_ticket_id missing (violates r5); version not semver; last_reviewed not ISO date.

antipattern.description: owner_email is a team alias (engineering@, ops@).
antipattern.reason: Violates r2 — team-aliased flags become zombies.

antipattern.description: ramp_plan jumps from one stage directly to 100 for type != ops.
antipattern.reason: Violates r3 — only ops kill-switches may go to 100 in one step.

antipattern.description: cleanup_ticket_id is empty or references a closed ticket.
